'''Serdo''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who owned the [[Yacht/Legends|yacht]] ''[[Firerider]]'', which he used as part of a charter service for wealthy clients.

==Biography==
Serdo had a reputation for being a trustworthy and reliable being, however his charter business with the ''Firerider'' was in reality a cover for his [[Spice/Legends|spice]]-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] operation. His high profile clients provided the perfect shield against customs agents, counting on the fact that most customs officials would not chance inconveniencing a Moff, a powerful executive or a high-ranking military officer with anything more than the most cursory of customs inspections. After retiring, Serdo sold the ''Firerider'' to a [[Bith/Legends|Bith]] named [[Fiz Cor'gril|Fizzi]], who owned a dealership on [[Trevi IV]].<ref name="Stock Ships" />
